final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit SRAM cell with read and write functionality. Data is written to the cell when WE is low, and data is read from the cell when RE is low.
module SRAM_Cell (
    input wire [3:0] D,
    input wire WE,
    input wire RE,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);
    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (WE) begin
            memory <= D; // Write data to memory
        end
        if (RE) begin
            Q <= memory; // Read data from memory
        end
    end
endmodule
